claim: Former President Joe Biden “fired” 14,000 Keystone XL pipeline workers “​​on day one” of his administration.

thought:

data:
statement,value
"Joe Biden fired 14000 Keystone XL pipeline workers on first day of his administration",TRUE
code:
import pandas as pd

def validate_statement(df):
    return df.loc[df['statement'] == "Joe Biden fired 14000 Keystone XL pipeline workers on first day of his administration", 'value'].values[0]

# Load the CSV file
df = pd.read_csv("data.csv")
result = validate_statement(df)
print(result)
